buildCommand: mkdir -p Backend/convex/_generated && cp _convex_generated/* Backend/convex/_generated/ && cd Frontend/iwhome.app-base44sdk && npm install && npm run build
installCommand: git config --global url."https://${GH_SUBMODULE_TOKEN}@github.com/".insteadOf "https://github.com/" && rm -rf Frontend && git clone https://github.com/Core829-Digital/iwhome.app-frontend.git Frontend
